name: Cute Chibi Keychain
body:

A close-up photo of a cute, colorful keychain held by person's hand. The keychain features a chibi-style of the [attached image ]. The keychain is made of soft rubber with bold black outlines and attached to a small silver keyring, neutral background

## Notes
The `[attached image]` part of the prompt needs to be used in conjunction with an uploaded image.

## Reference Image
A photo of a person or object as the subject for the keychain design.

## Source
- [Original Post](https://x.com/azed_ai/status/1916521742052503804)

## Example Output
![Cute Chibi Keychain](/media/3d/cute-chibi-keychain.webp)
description_en: Image-generation prompt that renders an uploaded subject as a soft-rubber chibi keychain held in hand.
description_zh: 图像生成提示词，把上传的主体渲染成手持的软胶 Q 版钥匙扣。
long_en: Produces a close-up of a colorful rubber keychain with bold black outlines on a silver keyring against a neutral background, based on an attached image. Needs an image model that accepts a reference photo.
long_zh: 依据上传图片生成一张彩色软胶钥匙扣特写：粗黑描边、挂在银色钥匙环上、中性背景。需要支持参考图的图像模型。
sec_note_en: Requires an image-generation model and an uploaded reference image that is sent to a third-party service.
sec_note_zh: 需要图像生成模型，并将上传的参考图发送给第三方服务。
